details: The scheme "Own Transformer Scheme" launched by the Energy Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh aims to provide quick permanent irrigation pump connections to farmers by allowing them to install transformers at their own cost as per set standards, individually or in groups.
benefits: Farmers can install transformers at their own expense according to prescribed standards.
Farmers have the option to install transformers collectively as a group.
eligibility: The applicant must be a farmer.
The applicant must be a resident of Madhya Pradesh.
The applicant should be willing to install the transformer at their own expense.

offline: The applicant can avail of the scheme benefits through the concerned electricity distribution company.

faqs.question: What is the objective of this scheme?
faqs.answer: The "Own Transformer Scheme" is a government initiative allowing farmers to install their own transformers for permanent irrigation pump connections.

faqs.question: Who launched the scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme was launched by the Energy Department, Government of Madhya Pradesh.

faqs.question: Who can apply under this scheme?
faqs.answer: Farmers can apply under this scheme.

faqs.question: Can farmers install transformers as a group?
faqs.answer: Yes, farmers can install transformers collectively as a group.

faqs.question: Who bears the cost of installation?
faqs.answer: The farmer bears the cost of transformer installation as per prescribed standards.

faqs.question: Which authority manages the installation process?
faqs.answer: The concerned distribution company manages the installation process.

faqs.question: What benefits do farmers get under this scheme?
faqs.answer: Farmers get quick access to permanent irrigation pump connections through self-installed transformers.

faqs.question: How does one apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Farmers can apply through their local electricity distribution company following standard procedures.
